meaning: n.辞别,再见,再会int.再会,别了!(常含有永别或不容易再见面的意思)
examples: When we decide to say farewell, we are not far from reunion.
I bade all my friends farewell.
I bade farewell to all the friends I had made in Paris.
She bowed farewell to her friend.
Thierry Henry gets a late winner for Arsenal on his second farewell to the Premier League.
